description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped boulder with a rugged surface, covered in patches of green and yellow moss. The rock displays a mix of gray, brown, and earthy tones, with natural striations and weathering marks visible across its surface. Its form is roughly rounded but asymmetrical, with some flatter faces and more protruding edges. The moss coverage is uneven, creating a mottled appearance that blends with the stone's natural color variations. The surface texture appears coarse and gritty, with visible cracks and crevices. This rock would be a prominent feature in an outdoor urban park or landscaped area, serving as a naturalistic barrier or decorative element.
description: A large, moss-covered boulder with a rugged, irregular surface and a mix of gray, brown, and green tones. Its coarse texture and natural weathering make it a striking feature in an outdoor setting.
description_view_0: This view shows a broad, slightly flattened face with extensive moss coverage and visible gray stone striations.
description_view_1: This angle highlights a more rounded side with dense moss patches and fewer visible cracks.
description_view_2: This perspective reveals a flatter surface with a mix of moss and exposed stone, showing more weathering marks.
description_view_3: This view presents a somewhat angular face with prominent moss and a blend of light and dark stone areas.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped public space
